headline: Hilton Sticks With Plan for Bid Mideast Expansion
summary: Hilton hasn’t changed its plans to open more than 100 new hotels in the Middle East, even as local investors reel from the effects of the war with Iran, the hotel operator's chief executive said today.

headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: U.S. equity markets continued to show constructive momentum this week, with broad-based gains across major ETFs led by strength in technology and industrial sectors. Read more here...
